published.text:
### Hero
Heading: Missed Call Follow-Up Automation
Body: Every missed call is a potential customer choosing someone else. Most service businesses miss 20-40% of inbound calls — during jobs, after hours, on weekends. The callers rarely leave voicemails. They just call the next provider. Missed call follow-up automation sends an instant text within seconds of a missed call, starts a conversation, and captures the lead before they move on.
Sub: Below: how missed call automation works, what the caller actually experiences, and which businesses get the most value from it.

### Core sections
- What happens when a call goes unanswered (6-step flow)
- Why text-back beats voicemail (prose section with data)
- ROI of missed call follow-up

### FAQ
Subhead: Common questions about missed call follow-up automation

### Final CTA
Heading: Stop losing leads to voicemail
Body: Book a 30-minute call. We will look at how many calls you are missing, what those leads are worth, and how to start recovering them this month.

edits.description: Published as part of batch 3. High-value page added to GEO watchlist.
Direct, data-backed opening. Quantifies the problem immediately (20-40% missed calls).
Strong interlinks to HVAC missed call text back, AI lead follow-up, and after-hours capture.
Conversational tone, no jargon. Written for business owners, not marketers.
